summary: Start RR1-WEB-WORKER-RUNTIME-001 after the RR1 task graph closed on origin/main. Build the production Web simulation Worker runtime foundation without touching forbidden product areas or starting downstream R1 tasks.

tests_run.result: RR1-WEB-WORKER-RUNTIME-001 is the only dependency-ready R1 task.

decisions.decision: Start only RR1-WEB-WORKER-RUNTIME-001 after RR1 task graph closure; no other R1 child runs in parallel.
Writer owns only the task allowed_paths and must not touch sim-core, desktop, UI, map-renderer, platform, save-format, content, CI, dependency, roadmap, or historical Gate paths.

risks.summary: Normal Web/Electron still need authoritative Worker runtime wiring; this task creates the Web foundation and protocol seams.
Worker foundation must avoid implementing downstream command UI, time controls, or save/restart behavior beyond stable transport seams.

requested_action: Implement the production Web simulation Worker runtime foundation within the task allowed_paths, set the task to REVIEW, and emit project/messages/outbox/RR1-WEB-WORKER-RUNTIME-001__MSG-20260711-WRITER-REVIEW__client_engineer.json with actual tests and scope evidence. Do not create PRs or start reviewers.
